summary: Frontend regression testing after earthy theme UI redesign for Sugarcane AI app. All 13 critical flows tested across admin and regular user roles. 100% pass rate. Branding, language toggle (EN/HI/MR), admin panel tabs and stats, role-based nav, upload area, history search, and navigation all working correctly.

issues: Dashboard content (heading 'Dashboard', subtitle, dropzone label) appears very faint/low contrast on the #F5F5F0 background in screenshot - text seems to use a near-background color. Worth verifying contrast ratio for accessibility (WCAG AA needs 4.5:1). Functionally the dropzone is present and clickable.

action_items: (Low priority) Add data-testid attributes to RegisterPage.js inputs (register-username-input, register-password-input, register-submit-button) for testing reliability. Currently fields are only locatable via input[type=text]/input[type=password]/button[type=submit].
(Low priority) Verify text contrast on the user Dashboard - the heading and subtitle appear washed-out against the cream #F5F5F0 background in viewport screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: RegisterPage.js is missing data-testid attributes on form inputs and submit button - inconsistent with rest of app which uses them widely. Should be added for testability.

Admin panel tabs (Pending/Reviewed/Overview/Users/All Scans) are rendered as <button> with text labels but no data-testid - works via text selectors but adding tab-pending, tab-reviewed etc. testids would improve robustness.
Stat cards in AdminPage do not have data-testid - works via text content but harder to assert reliably in tests.

test_credentials.test_user_created: testfarmer72294 / test123 (registered during testing, auto-logged-in to dashboard - no profile-setup step required this time)

seed_data_creation: Created one regular user via registration flow: testfarmer72294
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend UI redesign (earthy green #1A3626 theme) verified working. Key results: (1) Admin login -> /dashboard works, (2) SUGARCANE AI branding visible in nav and login hero, (3) Language toggle EN/HI/MR functional - Marathi label 'डॅशबोर्ड' confirmed for nav-dashboard, (4) Admin sees 5 tabs (Pending, Reviewed, Overview, Users, All Scans), 4 stat cards (Total Users, Total Scans, Pending, Diseases) and download-ZIP button, (5) Admin dashboard has upload-dropzone and detect-disease-button, (6) Regular user (testfarmer72294) registered, auto-logged-in to dashboard, sees only Dashboard + History nav (no Diseases/Admin), (7) History page loads with search input placeholder 'Search by disease or status...', (8) Navigation between Dashboard <-> History works. Important data-testids used: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, language-toggle-dropdown, lang-en/lang-hi/lang-mr, nav-dashboard, nav-history, nav-diseases, nav-admin, logout-btn, admin-page, admin-download-zip-button, upload-dropzone, detect-disease-button, dashboard-page, history-page, profile-name-input, profile-mobile-input, profile-save-button. RegisterPage has NO testids on its fields.

features_tested.admin_panel_tabs: PASS (all 5 tabs: Pending, Reviewed, Overview, Users, All Scans)
features_tested.admin_panel_stats_cards: PASS (Total Users, Total Scans, Pending, Diseases)
